---
title: "Eyrie Bleaching events"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true       
    code-summary: "Code"
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## 

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 10


devtools::load_all()
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
#library(dhw)

# extract eyrie gridcell and process climatology
OISST <- rast("/Volumes/Extreme_SSD/dhw/summaries/GBR_OISST2_SST.tif")

cell <- terra::cellFromXY(OISST, cbind(145.45406,  -14.71838))[1]
xy   <- terra::xyFromCell(OISST, cell)
rs   <- terra::res(OISST)
e <- terra::ext(
  xy[1] - rs[1]/2 + 1e-10, xy[1] + rs[1]/2 - 1e-10,
  xy[2] - rs[2]/2 + 1e-10, xy[2] + rs[2]/2 - 1e-10
)
oisst_cell_ts <- terra::crop(OISST, e, snap = "in")
eyrie_climatology <- create_climatology(oisst_cell_ts, baa = TRUE, quiet=TRUE)

# set survey dates
surveys <- 


# plot
eyrie_sst <- plot_sst_timeseries(eyrie_climatology, title = "Eyrie Reef",
                    startdate = "2023-11-01", enddate = "2026-02-28", legend_position = c(0.92, 0.4)) 

# add survey dates

eyrie_sst +
  ylim(22, 32) +
  geom_vline(
    data = tibble(date = as.Date(c("2023-12-10", "2024-03-19", "2024-09-10", "2025-03-17", "2026-01-31"))),
    aes(xintercept = date),
    linewidth = 1,
    linetype = "solid",
    alpha = 0.15,
    color = "darkblue",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = tibble(date = as.Date(c("2023-12-10", "2024-03-19", "2024-09-10", "2025-03-17", "2026-01-31"))) |>
      mutate(label = format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"), y = 30.7),
    aes(x = date, y = y, label = label),
    angle = 90,
    vjust = -0.2,
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
   scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 year",
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(22,32), breaks = seq(22,32,2)) + 
  xlab( "year")


```
